positive: A stylized, abstract representation of a celestial fox spirit (Kitsune) in flight, rendered in negative space. The fox should have a graceful, elegant silhouette, embodying dynamic movement against a dark, cosmic background. Incorporate luminous bioluminescent trails and constellations forming its tail and aura. The color palette must be limited to deep midnight blues, rich sapphire, brilliant gold accents, and sharp white highlights. Use a clean, minimalist graphic novel aesthetic combined with glowing neon vaporwave effects. High contrast, central composition, perfect for a T-shirt print. Vector art influence, highly detailed, ultra sharp focus.
